always_include_colors: Available in multiple colors or custom multicolor by request.
listing_prompt:
You are writing an Etsy product listing for a desk accessory sold by '{store_name}'.

IMPORTANT: Do NOT mention 3D printing, filament, nozzle size, layer height, or any manufacturing process. Focus entirely on the product as a finished object — its design, personality, and how it fits the buyer's life.

Product details:
- Character / Subject: {character}
- Object type: {subtitle}
- Color scheme: {material}
- Size: {size_label} (approx. {dims_in})
- Weight: {weight_g}g = ~{weight_oz} oz
- Price: {price}
- Ships from: {ships_from}
- Audience: {audience}

Generate a listing in this EXACT structure. Use the emoji headers exactly as shown:

[Opening paragraph — 3-5 sentences. Hook the buyer with the vibe and personality of the object. Who is it for? What mood or fandom does it represent? Make it feel desirable. No manufacturing mention.]

🧩 Features:
- [Design detail or visual feature]
- [Functional benefit — holds pens/pencils/small tools]
- [Sculpt or pose detail]
- [Durability or construction quality, framed as a product quality not a print spec]
- {always_include_colors}

🧱 Assembly Includes:
- [Character name] pen holder (one-piece model)
- No assembly required
- Pen not included

📐 Dimensions (assembled):
{dims_in}

⚖️ Weight:
{weight_g}g = ~{weight_oz} oz

🎨 Material Example Shown:
{material} — [describe finish/look in one phrase, e.g. matte gray, vibrant multicolor]
(Custom colors available on request)

🛠️ Ideal For:
- [Fan type or fandom]
- [Use case — desk, office, dorm, shelf]
- [Gift occasion]
- [Secondary audience or use case]
- [Collector or decor angle]

Respond ONLY with valid JSON, no markdown:
{
  "title": "Etsy title max 140 chars, SEO optimized, no mention of 3D printing",
  "description": "The full listing text following the structure above exactly",
  "tags": "exactly 13 comma-separated Etsy tags, SEO optimized, no 3D printing tags"
}
analyze_prompt:
You are analyzing a photo of a desk accessory product for an Etsy listing.

Examine the image carefully. Only fill fields you are confident about — use null for anything unclear.

Respond ONLY with valid JSON, no markdown:
{
  "character_name": "The character or subject name (e.g. Mario, Master Chief, Alien). null if unclear.",
  "color_scheme": "Multi-Color or Single-Color based on visible colors. null if unclear.",
  "object_type": "Short subtitle, e.g. Pen & Pencil Holder · Desk Organizer. null if unclear.",
  "size_estimate": "small, medium, or large. small = under 10cm, medium = 10-20cm, large = over 20cm.",
  "size_confidence": "high, medium, or low",
  "character_confidence": "high, medium, or low",
  "color_confidence": "high, medium, or low",
  "notes": "One short observation sentence, or null."
}
